MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kevin Barr, district manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Bayview Hunters Point Apartments, LP; Ivy Tseng, counsel for plaintiff

Rose Warren, defendant
Howard Thomas, Esq. by limited scope representation of defendant

Settlement conference held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 1457 Lasalle Avenue, #317, San Francisco, CA 94124.

April 21, 2008 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Linda Fong, not reported (218)
